Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: E19
Complete Control Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, stuns the enemy with the highest damage for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, turns the enemy with highest damage into stone for 3 sec. During this time, they can't move, and they take 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 24% / 30% / 38% more damage.

Enhancement: 3
6000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, turns the enemy with highest damage into stone for 3 sec. During this time, they can't move, and they take 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 24% / 30% / 38% more damage. Also, tears through the target's armor. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 28200 / 40300 / 57600 / 76800 / 96000 / 120000 / 156000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 21% / 23% / 24% / 26% / 28% / 30% / 33% for 3 sec.
Stacks up to 3 times. The target of the ability also takes 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 260000 physical damage for 3 sec.
